| First selection | [Shamorie Ponds](/wiki/Shamorie_Ponds "Shamorie Ponds"), [Delaware Blue Coats](/wiki/Delaware_Blue_Coats "Delaware Blue Coats") |
| ← [Jan. 2021](/wiki/2021_NBA_G_League_draft_(January) "2021 NBA G League draft (January)")  [2022](/wiki/2022_NBA_G_League_draft "2022 NBA G League draft") → | |

The **October 2021 NBA G League draft** was the 21st draft of the [NBA G League](/wiki/NBA_G_League "NBA G League").

The [Delaware Blue Coats](/wiki/Delaware_Blue_Coats "Delaware Blue Coats") had the first overall selection after a three-team trade involving the [South Bay Lakers](/wiki/South_Bay_Lakers "South Bay Lakers") and [Memphis Hustle](/wiki/Memphis_Hustle "Memphis Hustle").[[1]](#cite_note-1) The Blue Coats selected [Shamorie Ponds](/wiki/Shamorie_Ponds "Shamorie Ponds") with the first pick.

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| ^ | Denotes player who has been selected to (an) [NBA G League International Challenge Teams(s)](/wiki/NBA_G_League_International_Challenge "NBA G League International Challenge") |
| \* | Denotes player who has been selected to (an) NBA G League International Challenge Team(s) and was also selected in an [NBA draft](/wiki/NBA_draft "NBA draft") |
| † | Denotes player who was also selected in an NBA Draft |
